errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

section.title: Game configuration
section.subtitle: Tweak your server settings without touching a config file.

save.fix_invalid: Fix the highlighted values before saving.

overlay.running_desc: The server must be offline before its configuration can be changed safely.

field.env_linked: Linked to environment variable {{name}} — editing this also updates it

copy.title: Copy configuration
copy.no_targets: You have no other server running the same egg.
copy.running_tip: Stop this server before copying configuration to it.
copy.preview_summary: {{params}} parameters will be copied to {{servers}} servers.
copy.copy_boosts: Also copy active and scheduled boosts

boost.select_hint: Tick the parameters to boost in the editor below, then configure the boost.
boost.restart_warning: Affected servers are automatically stopped when the boost starts and ends to apply the changes cleanly.
boost.auto_restart_warning: The server is automatically stopped and restarted at the start and end of each boost to apply the changes — including on every recurrence.
boost.max_cap_hint: Optional: a value the boost must not exceed for each parameter (defaults to the template max).
boost.multiply_tooltip: Multiply the value by the multiplier
boost.divide_tooltip: Divide the value by the multiplier (inverse effect — handy to shrink an interval)
boost.update_failed: The boost could not be updated.
boost.invalid: Tick at least one parameter and a multiplier above 0.
boost.create_failed: The boost could not be created.
boost.overlap: A boost already covers one of these parameters. Cancel it first.
boost.active_tip: Active boost x{{mult}} until {{end}}, effective value: {{value}}

add_param.title: Add a parameter
add_param.intro: Add a key to this file. It is written into the chosen section and comes back as an editable field.
add_param.failed: The parameter could not be added.

annotate.title: Annotate parameter
annotate.intro: Describe this discovered parameter ({{key}}) to document it in the template — label, description and type will apply to every server using this template.
annotate.failed: The annotation could not be saved.

admin.unauthorized: You need administrator access to manage templates.

list.title: Configuration templates
list.subtitle: Render schemas that drive the in-game configuration editor. Share them as JSON.
list.empty: No templates yet. Create one or import a JSON file to get started.
list.confirm_delete: Delete template "{{id}}"? The JSON file will be removed.
list.import_failed: Import failed. Check the JSON is valid.

editor.columns_hint: How parameters are laid out in the player editor.
editor.author: Author
editor.boost_blacklist_hint: Comma-separated parameter keys. Non-numeric parameters are excluded automatically.
editor.invalid_files_json: The files JSON is not valid JSON.
editor.save_failed: The template could not be saved.
editor.preview_empty: Add at least one file to preview the editor.
editor.import_title: Import config files from a server
editor.import_pick_hint: Open folders to browse, tick the config files you want, then import.
editor.import_browse_failed: Couldn't list this folder. Check the server is online and reachable.
editor.import_unsupported_file: None of the selected files could be imported (unsupported type or unreadable).
editor.links_intro: Choose which sections show, and link parameters to a server env variable (editing the value then also updates the variable).
editor.links_fix_json: Fix the files JSON above to edit links & sections.
editor.links_env_server: Load variable names from a server

visual.intro: Edit each parameter visually — label, display type, options, default — without touching the JSON. Changes sync with the JSON tab.
visual.empty: Add at least one file (Edit tab) to use the visual editor.
